server/tests/test_stats.py :: test_channel_means_on_solid_red
def test_channel_means_on_solid_red():
    raster = solid_raster(8, 8, 200, 40, 40)
    means = channel_means(raster)
    assert means["red"] == 200.0
    assert means["green"] == 40.0
    assert means["blue"] == 40.0

server/tests/test_stats.py :: test_channel_stddev_is_zero_on_flat_field
def test_channel_stddev_is_zero_on_flat_field():
    raster = solid_raster(6, 6, 90, 90, 90)
    stddev = channel_stddev(raster)
    assert stddev["red"] == 0.0
    assert stddev["green"] == 0.0
    assert stddev["blue"] == 0.0

server/tests/test_stats.py :: test_sharpness_higher_on_checkerboard_than_solid
def test_sharpness_higher_on_checkerboard_than_solid():
    solid = solid_raster(16, 16, 100, 100, 100)
    checker = high_contrast_patch(16, 16)
    assert sharpness_estimate(checker) > sharpness_estimate(solid)

server/tests/test_stats.py :: test_colorfulness_higher_on_gradient_than_gray
def test_colorfulness_higher_on_gradient_than_gray():
    gradient = gradient_raster(24, 16)
    gray = solid_raster(24, 16, 120, 120, 120)
    assert colorfulness_estimate(gradient) > colorfulness_estimate(gray)

server/tests/test_stats.py :: test_exposure_labels
def test_exposure_labels():
    assert exposure_label(solid_raster(4, 4, 10, 10, 10)) == "underexposed"
    assert exposure_label(solid_raster(4, 4, 230, 230, 230)) == "overexposed"
    assert exposure_label(solid_raster(4, 4, 128, 128, 128)) == "balanced"

server/tests/test_stats.py :: test_low_contrast_sample_has_lower_contrast_than_high_contrast
def test_low_contrast_sample_has_lower_contrast_than_high_contrast():
    low = build_image_stats(low_contrast_patch(16, 16))
    high = build_image_stats(high_contrast_patch(16, 16))
    assert low["contrast"]["range"] < high["contrast"]["range"]
    assert low["contrast"]["stddev"] < high["contrast"]["stddev"]
